description: The Zindato-Caracciolo are a 'ndrina of the 'Ndrangheta based in Reggio Calabria, Italy, linked to the more powerful Libri clan. Key figures include Francesco Zindato and Antonino Caracciolo. The group has been involved in extortion and mafia association, with several operations leading to arrests in 2010, 2014, and 2020.
